text: What if I told you two different organisms can become one? Meet lichen, a remarkable partnership between fungi and algae. The fungi provide structure and protection, while algae produce food through photosynthesis. Together, they can survive in extreme environments—rocky surfaces, deserts, even the Arctic! But here’s the catch—scientists are still unraveling the full extent of this collaboration. Curious about more science mysteries? Follow for more!
